schema.endpoint: Metachronous second primary thyroid cancer from month 7 through month 66 after index breast cancer diagnosis

combined_summary_stage: Regional by both direct extension and lymph node involvement
laterality: Paired site, but no information concerning laterality
radiation_recode: Combination of beam with implants or isotopes
Radiation, NOS  method or source not specified

labels.age: Age at breast cancer diagnosis, years

notes.surgery_primary_site: SEER surgery code used by the locked model. Common breast surgery codes include 22-24 for breast-conserving surgery and 40-80 for mastectomy-related categories; use the original SEER value when available.
notes.regional_nodes_examined: Enter the number recorded in SEER. Use 0 if no nodes were examined.

schema.runtime_note: The web service applies the saved preprocessor, CatBoost raw margin, and Platt calibrator from the local runtime bundle.

categorical_categories: Regional by both direct extension and lymph node involvement
Paired site, but no information concerning laterality
Combination of beam with implants or isotopes
Radiation, NOS  method or source not specified
